Description:
**NOTE**: Both host & clients require CD2 Update 17, MEV v5.4, DEA b02.1 & EEE v1.5.4
  **NOTE**: Only host requires NoGasSpitPraet.pak
  
  A significantly harder & more combat-intensive version of DR. Influenced by Interstellar Plus & LX Ultra.

  Beta 02: 
  - (Change from b01) Added Mactera Stormchasers that spawns Mactera Disruptors to the enemy pool, eliminate all of the highlighted Disruptors to remove the Stormchaser's invulnerable phase
  - Increased the Tox Spreader's spawn cost from 90 to 110
  - Removed the HP buff from Dreads in their WS

Messages.Message: The Signal Jammer has spawned! Resupply drops & health regeneration have been disabled!

Name: Death Bringer V2 [B02]C
